gives the impression of being richer than he actually is.
Financially, the important years will be 20th, 24th, 29th,
36th, 47th, 56th and 6lst.
Third Drekkana (21°-30°).—The subject generally
takes risks in money matters and is pulled down by his
enemies. He is generally fortunate in financial matters. The
21st, 25th, 31st, 34th, 36th, 42nd, 45th, 5lst and 52nd years
will be important.

110 How to Judge a Horoscope
Taurus or Vrischika
First Drekkana (1°-10°).—The native earns a lot of
money, but it does not stay in his hands. Unless he takes
precautions in his earlier years of life, the advanced period
will be anxious. He is never frugal in financial matters. He
will hardly leave anything for his children and dependants.
He will get into debt and his properties will be encumbered.
He is likely to lose by legal affairs and strifes. The
important years will be 21st, 23rd, 31st, 42nd, 51st, 65th
and 68th.
